name: accounting firms processing 10–20 expense claims/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 expense claims/month, discrepancies cause late financial reporting. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of expense claims and corporate card statements.
problem_solved: discrepancies between employee expense claims and corporate card statements
